content:
Goal
* Please rewrite as follows for clarity:

Given an integer [[n]], output a symmetric diamond-shaped digit pattern. For a diamond of size [[n]], the rules are:

• Each row [[i]] ([[i]] = 1 to [[n]]) starts from the integer [[i]].

• Digits in each row increase step by step toward the center and then mirror back.

• The middle row is the widest row containing (2 * [[n]] - 1) digits with no spaces. All other rows are centered by adding spaces on the left.

• The bottom half of the diamond is a vertically symmetric copy of the top half (excluding the middle row).

Input
* Please format "n" as a [[variable]].

Output
* Please revise as follows (the rules need not be repeated here):

<<1 or more lines>>: The diamond pattern of digits of size [[n]].

Constraints
* Please format "n" as a [[variable]].

Cases
* Not an issue, but since (almost) all possible values are already used in both tests and validators, it's unnecessary to shuffle the order. The tests remain identical to the validators even if their order are different.

* [[n]] = 4 in both Validators 1 and 5. Please revise the value of [[n]] to 3 in Validator 1.

Thanks.
